svg.title: CAT+CSFS Vault — Opcode-Level Verification Pipeline
svg.desc: The CAT+CSFS vault uses a Taproot P2TR output with NUMS internal key. The trigger/withdraw leaf contains a verification pipeline: witness items flow through OP_CHECKSIGVERIFY, OP_CAT (twice), OP_CHECKSIGFROMSTACK, and hash comparison. The recover leaf is a simple CHECKSIG. Animation shows the witness stack, opcodes executing, and hash verification in sequence.

g.aria-label: Taproot P2TR with NUMS internal key
Recovery leaf — simple cold key signature
Recovery CHECKSIG — cold key signature only
